seed_pages.content:
---
title: Marisol Novalis
type: person
aliases: [marisol]
summary: Founder of Windrose.
---

Marisol Novalis is the founder of Windrose. Marisol pushed back on the proposed valuation during diligence.

---
title: Windrose
type: company
summary: Seed-stage company. Founded by Marisol Novalis.
---

Windrose is a seed-stage company. Founded by Marisol Novalis. The seed conversation started in 2025.

turns.text: Just wrapped the Windrose call with Marisol Novalis.
Marisol said Windrose hit their growth target a month early. Ahead of plan.
I committed to sending Marisol the diligence checklist by Friday.
Marisol prefers async updates over standing calls. Noted for next time.
